title: Sharp PVP Sword
description: The pack makes a sharp sword, which is better for PvP.
body:
![Sharp Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7387df51a845f7495ebf5fc6bc900ef0d99798ca.png)

 Sharp sword designed for PvP, featuring a clean look and precise tip. Improves visibility, reduces screen clutter, and helps with timing and accuracy, making fights smoother and more controlled overall.

 ![Sharp Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d15917cd2983b3bbe981b556553d4a6f7198411.jpeg)

- made by Dokzera
   
[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sharp-pvp-sword)
   
  ![Sharp Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18c80bbae5fdfa85bf0b8c063c9e31c79f8d2147.png)
